prompt:
Goal: Create a high-fashion overseas magazine poster featuring an anime-style original character, using restrained typography, negative space, and an editorial mood rather than adding extra cuteness.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, off-white paper background with subtle concrete texture, faint stains, scratches, ink smudges, thin layout lines, and layered black rectangular graphic blocks.

Main subject: A delicate anime girl named NOZOMU posed from upper thighs to head, slightly angled, occupying the center and right side of the poster. She has very long pale blonde hair with soft highlights, flowing strands, and a large black bow hair accessory on the left side. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered muted beige square block, like a privacy mask or editorial placeholder. She wears a white frilled off-shoulder crop blouse with ruffles, puff sleeves, black straps, black bow accents, lace trim, and small jewelry details. Her lower outfit is a black plaid layered mini skirt with white frill underskirt, a wide black belt with silver buckle, hanging chains, and gothic street-fashion details. Her pose is refined and slightly mature: one hand near the ear, body relaxed, soft light on skin, elegant but youthful fashion-magazine atmosphere.

Layout and typography: Use large serif editorial typography in black and dark gray, mixed with small sans-serif captions. Put oversized stacked letters behind and beside the character reading “NO / ZO / MU” on the left half, partially hidden by the subject. Add fine rectangular frames and alignment guides around the typography.

Visible text content: Include exactly 8 distinct text areas: 1) top left title “NOZOMU” with small Japanese hiragana “のぞむ” beneath it; 2) small left headline “MODERN DREAMER.”; 3) small paragraph under it reading “SHE WALKS LIKE A THOUGHT THAT CHOSE TO SHINE.”; 4) large background typography “NO ZO MU”; 5) black strip near lower left reading “QUIET IMPACT.”; 6) tiny lower-left copy reading “NOT LOUD. NOT PERFECT. JUST UNFORGETTABLE.” plus small archive marks “///”, “N. 07”, and barcode lines; 7) top right label “ARCHIVE” with large number “07” and three small square dots; 8) right-side vertical text “OWN THE LIGHT.” beside a dark textured rectangular panel, plus a lower-right card reading “VISIBLE GRACE.” with small text “SOFT HEART. CLEAR VISION. STRONG PRESENCE.”

Visual style: Japanese anime illustration blended with Western fashion magazine poster design, monochrome editorial palette with warm cream, blush skin tones, pale blonde hair, black accents, and soft gray shadows. Use high detail in clothing, hair, chains, ruffles, and texture, while keeping the overall composition airy, elegant, and poster-like.

Constraints: Keep the square face-covering block visible and centered over the face; do not add extra characters; do not add more than the listed 8 text areas; avoid neon colors, clutter, logos, watermarks, or photorealistic rendering.
